hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储主席凯文·沃什向参议院银行委员会作证对经济和利率造成打击；【FINANCE】纽约联储主席威廉姆斯表示通胀已见顶，利率“处于有利位置”；【FINANCE】达拉斯联储主席洛根呼吁“适度”提高利率。

items.title: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Senate banking committee hits on economy, interest rates
items.summary: As part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader, Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House financial services committee.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什向参议院银行委员会作证对经济和利率造成打击
items.summary_zh: 作为国会授权央行行长出席国会山的一部分，沃什周二向众议院金融服务委员会发表讲话。

items.title: New York Fed President Williams says inflation has peaked, rates 'well positioned'
items.summary: Williams cited five reasons why he expects the latest price surge has run its course.
items.title_zh: 纽约联储主席威廉姆斯表示通胀已见顶，利率“处于有利位置”
items.summary_zh: 威廉姆斯列举了他预计最近的价格上涨已经结束的五个原因。

items.title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
items.summary: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.
items.title_zh: 达拉斯联储主席洛根呼吁“适度”提高利率
items.summary_zh: 这位政策制定者表示，本周的通胀好消息还不够好。

items.title: Buffett says Trump's pick of Kevin Warsh for Fed chair was 'good choice'
items.summary: Warren Buffett believes Fed Chair Kevin Warsh will do the best job he can.
items.title_zh: 巴菲特表示特朗普选择凯文·沃什担任美联储主席是“不错的选择”
items.summary_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特相信美联储主席凯文·沃什将尽其所能。

items.title: A better way to turn 2D designs into 3D models for rapid prototyping
items.summary: Researchers developed an automated framework that helps AI models generate CAD programs more accurately and efficiently.
items.title_zh: 将 2D 设计转变为 3D 模型以进行快速原型设计的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一个自动化框架，帮助 AI 模型更准确、更高效地生成 CAD 程序。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Hits Bridges and a Port in Country’s South, Iranian Media says
items.summary: The U.S. military’s Central Command said the latest round of attacks had “hit dozens of Iranian military targets” but made no mention of civilian infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗媒体称，美国袭击了该国南部的桥梁和港口
items.summary_zh: 美国军方中央司令部表示，最新一轮袭击“袭击了数十个伊朗军事目标”，但没有提及民用基础设施。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin slips to $63,000 as the chip rout goes global
items.summary: A deepening global selloff in chipmakers dragged risk assets lower, pulling bitcoin back from the $65,000 it reached on this week's soft inflation print.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：随着全球芯片溃败，比特币跌至 63,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 全球芯片制造商的抛售不断加深，拖累风险资产走低，将比特币从本周疲软通胀数据中触及的 65,000 美元拉回。

items.title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price bets on active management with first multi-token crypto ETF
items.summary: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.
items.title_zh: 价值 1.9 万亿美元的资产管理公司 T. Rowe Price 通过首个多代币加密 ETF 押注主动管理
items.summary_zh: T. Rowe Price 推出了据称是业内首个主动管理的多代币现货加密 ETF，提供多元化的数字资产投资。

items.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin outlook sees ‘encouraging sign’ as Strategy boosts cash reserves
items.summary: Strategy's larger cash reserves and improving institutional demand in bitcoin futures are "encouraging signs" for bitcoin, JPMorgan said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，随着战略增加现金储备，比特币前景出现“令人鼓舞的迹象”
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通表示，Strategy 更大的现金储备和机构对比特币期货的需求不断改善，对比特币来说是“令人鼓舞的迹象”。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
items.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.
items.title_zh: 沃伦参议员表示，特朗普的 CFPB 改革让美国人损失了 265 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 表示，特朗普政府取消 CFPB 规则和执行，迄今为止已给美国人造成高达 265 亿美元的损失。

items.title: Anthropic moves closer to mega-IPO as bankers line up investor meetings
items.summary: Anthropic is lining up investor meetings ahead of a potential IPO as soon as October as the AI startup behind looks to beat rival OpenAI to the public markets.
items.title_zh: 银行家们纷纷召开投资者会议，Anthropic 距离大型 IPO 又近了一步
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 正准备在 10 月份潜在的 IPO 之前召开投资者会议，这家人工智能初创公司希望在公开市场上击败竞争对手 OpenAI。

items.title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
items.summary: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特今天在市场上表示：“当每个人都喜欢赌博时，很难找到价值”
items.summary_zh: 这位投资者一直对股市持尖锐批评态度，他表示股市越来越多地被投机交易而非长期投资所定义。

items.title: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
items.summary: The law now allows the adoption of male distant relatives aged over 15 back into the imperial family.
items.title_zh: 日本放宽皇室继承规则 - 但对女天皇的禁令仍然存在
items.summary_zh: 现在法律允许皇室收养15岁以上的男性远亲。

items.title: Olympic cyclist admits to driving despite ban after crash that killed wife
items.summary: Rohan Dennis pleaded guilty to driving while disqualified after police pulled him over last month.
items.title_zh: 奥运自行车手承认在撞车事故导致妻子死亡后不顾禁令开车
items.summary_zh: 罗汉·丹尼斯(Rohan Dennis)上个月被警方拦下后，承认了在被取消驾驶资格的情况下开车的罪名。

items.title: The 20-Somethings Running Ukraine’s War Machine
items.summary: A new generation has been cutting red tape to speed weapons to the front. But the old guard pushed back, and now Ukraine’s young defense minister is out.
items.title_zh: 运行乌克兰战争机器的 20 多岁年轻人
items.summary_zh: 新一代人一直在减少繁文缛节，以加快武器投入前线的速度。但保守派进行了反击，现在乌克兰年轻的国防部长下台了。

items.title: As Blazes Spread Near Paris, Extreme Heat Is Changing How France Fights Fires
items.summary: Until recently, France’s forest fires were mostly in the south. This week, fires are raging much farther north. France is having to rethink its firefighting strategy.
items.title_zh: 随着巴黎附近大火蔓延，极端高温正在改变法国的灭火方式
items.summary_zh: 直到最近，法国的森林火灾主要发生在南部。本周，大火在更北的地方肆虐。法国不得不重新考虑其消防策略。

items.title: Dubai Migrant Worker Layoffs Reveal Costs of Middle East War
items.summary: The Persian Gulf city attracted migrant workers with the promise of opportunity. Many now say the war has brought job losses and salary cuts.
items.title_zh: 迪拜移民工人裁员揭示中东战争的代价
items.summary_zh: 这座波斯湾城市以其机遇吸引了移民工人。许多人现在表示，战争带来了失业和减薪。

items.title: He Was a Russian Political Survivor, Until the Masked Men Appeared
items.summary: Boris B. Nadezhdin, an outspoken opponent of the war in Ukraine, says he knows why he was detained: “Among our leadership, there is panic and chaos.”
items.title_zh: 他是俄罗斯政治幸存者，直到蒙面人出现
items.summary_zh: 直言不讳地反对乌克兰战争的鲍里斯·B·纳杰日丁 (Boris B. Nadezhdin) 表示，他知道自己被拘留的原因：“我们的领导层充满了恐慌和混乱。”

items.title: Japan Passes New Law Banning Flag Desecration in Nationalist Push
items.summary: The new law is part of a campaign by Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, a hard-line conservative, to build a more patriotic and assertive Japan. Critics say it undermines free speech.
items.title_zh: 日本通过新法律禁止在民族主义运动中亵渎国旗
items.summary_zh: 新法律是强硬保守派首相高市早苗运动的一部分，目的是建设一个更加爱国和自信的日本。批评者称这破坏了言论自由。

items.title: Airbnb CEO says X account was hacked, attacker posted AI-slop on tokenization
items.summary: Brian Chesky regained control of his account and told any new crypto followers he would be a "disappointing follow".
items.title_zh: Airbnb 首席执行官表示 X 账户被黑客攻击，攻击者在代币化方面发布了 AI-slop
items.summary_zh: 布莱恩·切斯基（Brian Chesky）重新控制了他的账户，并告诉任何新的加密货币追随者，他将是一个“令人失望的追随者”。

items.title: This $28 million ether market bet aims to profit from pure market chaos
items.summary: The mega trade aims to profit from a potential surge in ether price turbulence.
items.title_zh: 这个 2800 万美元的以太市场赌注旨在从纯粹的市场混乱中获利
items.summary_zh: 这一大型交易的目的是从以太币价格波动的潜在飙升中获利。

items.title: Taiwan sentences BitShine crypto exchange ringleader to 22 years in $39 million fraud case: reports
items.summary: The defendant reportedly led a criminal group that operated under the guise of BitShine, which was once registered with the FSC.
items.title_zh: 台湾因 3900 万美元欺诈案判处 BitShine 加密货币交易所头目 22 年监禁：报告
items.summary_zh: 据报道，被告领导了一个假借 BitShine 名义开展活动的犯罪集团，该集团曾在 FSC 注册。

items.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
items.title_zh: 美国正在通过州和联邦行动推进人工智能安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了人工智能治理的“反向联邦制”方法，其中州法律帮助建立安全、民主人工智能的国家框架。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Helping AI models to meet the real world
items.summary: Through research and entrepreneurship, Professor Devavrat Shah is helping to design methods that can handle constant decision-making using limited computational resources.
items.title_zh: 帮助AI模型满足现实世界
items.summary_zh: 通过研究和创业，Devavrat Shah 教授正在帮助设计可以使用有限的计算资源处理持续决策的方法。

items.title: Trump Media to sell instant access to 'market-moving' social posts
items.summary: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed to its most influential posts for Wall Street traders.
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售“影响市场”社交帖子的即时访问权限
items.summary_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出其最有影响力的帖子的快速付费提要。

items.title: Bitcoin faces fresh headwinds as China’s Kimi beats Claude, GPT in coding benchmark
items.summary: Moonshot's Kimi K3 took the top spot in frontend coding away from Claude and OpenAI, and it's free. Semiconductor stocks fell, and crypto fell with them.
items.title_zh: 随着中国的 Kimi 在编码基准测试中击败 Claude、GPT，比特币面临新的阻力
items.summary_zh: Moonshot 的 Kimi K3 从 Claude 和 OpenAI 手中夺走了前端编码领域的榜首，而且它是免费的。半导体股票下跌，加密货币也随之下跌。

items.title: AI frenzy losing steam leaves bitcoin less volatile than South Korean stocks
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 17, 2026
items.title_zh: 人工智能狂热失去动力，比特币的波动性低于韩国股票
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 17 日天气预报

items.title: Risk-off wave drags bitcoin below $63,000 as AI selloff spreads from stocks to crypto
items.summary: Crypto fell as AI stock fatigue and U.S.-Iran tensions weighed on sentiment, though a technical measure hints at oversold conditions heading into the weekend.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能抛售从股票蔓延到加密货币，避险浪潮将比特币拖至 63,000 美元下方
items.summary_zh: 由于人工智能股票疲软和美国与伊朗的紧张局势打压市场情绪，加密货币下跌，尽管技术指标暗示周末将出现超卖情况。

items.title: Ether falls twice as hard as bitcoin and HYPE drops 10% as the chip trade unwinds
items.summary: Japan's Nikkei had its worst day since March. Ether is still the only major holding a gain on the week, barely.
items.title_zh: 随着芯片交易的平仓，以太币的跌幅是比特币的两倍，HYPE 下跌 10%
items.summary_zh: 日本日经指数经历了三月份以来最糟糕的一天。以太坊仍然是本周唯一勉强上涨的主要货币。

items.title: DOG Mode vs. BIP-110: Inside the Bitcoin client built to bypass data restrictions
items.summary: While BIP 110 wants to restrict data through a consensus change and has almost no miner support, a new DOG Mode client wants the opposite and requires no vote at all.
items.title_zh: DOG 模式与 BIP-110：为绕过数据限制而构建的比特币客户端内部
items.summary_zh: 虽然 BIP 110 希望通过共识变更来限制数据并且几乎没有矿工支持，但新的 DOG 模式客户端却想要相反的结果，并且根本不需要投票。

items.title: Bitcoin under $63,000 after new U.S. strike on Iran. Trump's China comment adds to uncertainty
items.summary: Geopolitical tensions and renewed fears of U.S.-China frictions are weighing on risk assets, including bitcoin.
items.title_zh: 美国新一轮打击伊朗后，比特币跌破 63,000 美元。特朗普的中国言论增加了不确定性
items.summary_zh: 地缘政治紧张局势和对中美摩擦的新担忧正在给包括比特币在内的风险资产带来压力。

items.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
items.title_zh: 为什么青少年应该获得安全的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过适合年龄的保护、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作伙伴关系，让 ChatGPT 对青少年来说更安全。

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 现在是 Microsoft 365 Copilot 中的首选模型
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.6 如何为 Microsoft 365 Copilot 提供更强大的跨 Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Chat 和 Cowork 的 AI 功能，从而实现更快、更高质量的工作。

items.title: Newer Models, Same Advantage
items.title_zh: 更新型号，同样的优势

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
items.title_zh: 模型路由很简单。直到它不是。

items.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
items.title_zh: 本机速度 vLLM 变压器建模后端

items.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
items.summary: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.
items.title_zh: 通过两项 Google Vids 更新创建、编辑视频并为其加注星标
items.summary_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Google Vids 中的个人头像让视频创作变得比以往更容易。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
items.summary: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.
items.title_zh: 印度今年最大规模的 IPO 在机构狂热的推动下吸引了价值 310 亿美元的投标
items.summary_zh: 印度最大资产管理公司的IPO于周四结束，引起了机构投资者的浓厚兴趣。

items.title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
items.summary: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.
items.title_zh: 由于 SpaceX 股价跌破 IPO 价格，卖空者纷纷买入
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 称，目前约有 1.85 亿股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占该公司可公开交易流通股的 29%。

items.title: ‘Arsenal of democracy’: Jamie Dimon announces $24 million effort to boost American shipbuilding
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon unveiled a $24 million package to bolster American shipbuilding, funding a new submarine facility at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
items.title_zh: “民主武器库”：杰米戴蒙宣布投入 2400 万美元促进美国造船业
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 公布了一项 2400 万美元的计划，以支持美国造船业，为费城海军造船厂的新潜艇设施提供资金。

items.title: Iran accuses US of hitting civilian infrastructure
items.summary: The US military says its attacks were intended to "further degrade Iranian military capabilities".
items.title_zh: 伊朗指责美国袭击民用基础设施
items.summary_zh: 美国军方表示，其袭击旨在“进一步削弱伊朗的军事能力”。

items.title: Trump alleges China meddled in 2020 election and questions voting security ahead of midterms
items.summary: China said Trump's claims were fabricated and US Democrats said he was paving the way to undermine November's elections.
items.title_zh: 特朗普指控中国干预 2020 年大选，并在中期选举前质疑投票安全
items.summary_zh: 中国称特朗普的说法是捏造的，美国民主党则称他正在为破坏11月的选举铺平道路。

items.title: More than 500 Rohingya vanished at sea - what happened?
items.summary: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingyas have disappeared since leaving Myanmar on 29 June.
items.title_zh: 超过 500 名罗兴亚人在海上失踪——到底发生了什么？
items.summary_zh: 自 6 月 29 日离开缅甸以来，两艘载有约 530 名罗辛亚人的船只失踪。

items.title: Philippines condemns monkey video on Chinese media as racist
items.summary: The AI video on China Daily showed a monkey in Philippine garments singing its claims to the South China Sea.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾谴责中国媒体上的猴子视频为种族主义
items.summary_zh: 《中国日报》上的人工智能视频显示，一只穿着菲律宾服装的猴子在唱着对南中国海的主权主张。

items.title: Uganda suspends school trips after 20 pupils die in bus crash
items.summary: Thousands die on Uganda's roads each year but this is one of its deadliest incidents involving children.
items.title_zh: 乌干达因公交车事故导致20名学生死亡 乌干达暂停学校旅行
items.summary_zh: 乌干达每年都有数千人死于道路上，但这是涉及儿童的最致命事件之一。

items.title: Canada fires prompt US air quality alerts as smoke blankets major cities
items.summary: Smoke from more than 800 blazes has filled major cities from Toronto and New York, to parts of the US Midwest and Great Lakes.
items.title_zh: 加拿大火灾引发美国空气质量警报，烟雾笼罩主要城市
items.summary_zh: 800 多起火灾产生的烟雾已经充满了从多伦多和纽约到美国中西部和五大湖部分地区的主要城市。

items.title: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
items.summary: The UK government said taking the firm into public hands would safeguard "a vital national capability".
items.title_zh: 中国猛烈抨击英国钢铁公司国有化
items.summary_zh: 英国政府表示，将该公司纳入公众手中将维护“重要的国家能力”。

items.title: ‘Suddenly, I Was Free’: A Chinese Pastor’s Journey From Jail to the U.S.
items.summary: In his first interview since being released by China, Pastor Ezra Jin Mingri details his surprise release after a direct appeal by President Trump to Xi Jinping.
items.title_zh: “突然之间，我自由了”：一位中国牧师从监狱到美国的旅程
items.summary_zh: 金明日牧师在被中国释放后的首次采访中详细介绍了在特朗普总统直接向习近平呼吁后他的意外释放。

items.title: How Andy Burnham, ‘King of the North,’ Conquered U.K. Politics
items.summary: A plain-spoken politician from a modest background in northwest England, Mr. Burnham became Labour leader — and Britain’s incoming prime minister — on Friday.
items.title_zh: “北方之王”安迪·伯纳姆如何征服英国政坛
items.summary_zh: 伯纳姆是一位来自英格兰西北部出身普通的政客，说话直率，于周五成为工党领袖，同时也是英国即将上任的首相。

items.title: Hundreds of Rohingya Feared Drowned at Sea
items.summary: Members of the persecuted minority group from Myanmar set off in search of a better life weeks ago, but news of their boats sinking only emerged recently. More than 500 are feared dead.
items.title_zh: 数百名罗兴亚人恐溺水身亡
items.summary_zh: 几周前，来自缅甸的受迫害少数民族成员出发寻找更好的生活，但他们的船只沉没的消息直到最近才传出。预计已有 500 多人死亡。

items.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Force a Grim Homecoming for Migrants
items.summary: Mass migration, which defines modern Venezuela, has heavily marked the earthquake, too, saving many who had left, but also making their grief harder.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震迫使移民艰难回国
items.summary_zh: 现代委内瑞拉的大规模移民也对地震造成了严重影响，拯救了许多离开的人，但也让他们更加悲伤。

items.title: Crypto-style derivatives reach AI compute ahead of planned CME and ICE futures: Bernstein
items.summary: Crypto-style perps and prediction markets hit AI compute ahead of CME and ICE, with regulated GPU futures targeted for late 2026.
items.title_zh: 加密风格的衍生品在计划的 CME 和 ICE 期货之前达到人工智能计算：Bernstein
items.summary_zh: 加密货币风格的 Perps 和预测市场先于 CME 和 ICE 冲击 AI 计算，受监管的 GPU 期货目标为 2026 年末。

items.title: UK gang jailed over $5.4 million crypto scam posing as police
items.summary: The gang impersonated police officers and used convincing fake police websites to steal more than £4M in cryptocurrency from eight victims.
items.title_zh: 英国犯罪团伙冒充警察进行加密货币诈骗，金额高达 540 万美元，被判入狱
items.summary_zh: 该团伙冒充警察，并利用令人信服的假警察网站从 8 名受害者那里窃取了超过 400 万英镑的加密货币。

items.title: USDT vs USDC: Comparing the Two Largest Stablecoins
items.summary: USDT and USDC are stablecoins pegged one-to-one to the U.S. dollar, each backed by reserves covering every token in circulation. Tether’s USDT is the largest stablecoin, with the deepest liquidity across global exchanges. Circle’s USDC is the second-largest, with Circle staking i
items.title_zh: USDT 与 USDC：比较两种最大的稳定币
items.summary_zh: USDT 和 USDC 是与美元一对一挂钩的稳定币，每种都由涵盖流通中的每种代币的储备支持。 Tether 的 USDT 是最大的稳定币，在全球交易所中拥有最深的流动性。 Circle 的 USDC 是第二大，Circle 质押 i

items.title: SEC vs CFTC: Who Regulates Crypto?
items.summary: Crypto oversight is split mainly between two agencies: the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). In broad terms, the SEC handles crypto assets that behave like investments in a company. Meanwhile, the CFTC handles assets tha
items.title_zh: SEC 与 CFTC：谁来监管加密货币？
items.summary_zh: 加密货币监管主要由两个机构负责：美国证券交易委员会（SEC）和商品期货交易委员会（CFTC）。从广义上讲，美国证券交易委员会处理的加密资产就像对公司的投资一样。与此同时，CFTC 处理的资产

items.title: MegaETH sunsets Mega Mafia accelerator program, noting ‘most’ of its successful apps left
items.summary: MegaETH did not take equity or governance positions in the approximately 20 projects incubated in the Mega Mafia.
items.title_zh: MegaETH 取消了 Mega Mafia 加速器计划，并指出“大部分”成功的应用程序都已离开
items.summary_zh: MegaETH 并未在 Mega Mafia 孵化的约 20 个项目中担任股权或治理职务。

items.title: ‘We’re going to get it done’: Crypto bill faces what could be final test over Trump conflicts of interest
items.summary: Optimism is brewing to get a crypto bill passed, with some variations on timing as onlookers wait to see how ethics will shake out.
items.title_zh: “我们将完成它”：加密货币法案可能面临特朗普利益冲突的最终考验
items.summary_zh: 加密货币法案的通过正在酝酿乐观情绪，但随着旁观者等待道德规范将如何改变，时间安排也有所不同。

items.title: Citadel Securities invests $400 million in Crypto.com at $20 billion valuation
items.summary: Crypto.com plans to use proceeds from its “first institutional funding round" to expand its tokenization and derivatives operations.
items.title_zh: Citadel 证券以 200 亿美元估值向 Crypto.com 投资 4 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Crypto.com 计划利用其“第一轮机构融资”的收益来扩大其代币化和衍生品业务。

items.title: Trump’s longtime teleprompter operator accused of using insider knowledge to place bets on Kalshi: ABC News
items.summary: President Trump's teleprompter is under scrutiny following a report alleging that he used insider knowledge to place bets on Kalshi.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的长期提词器操作员被指控利用内幕知识对卡尔希下注：美国广播公司新闻
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统的提词器正受到审查，因为有报道称他利用内幕知识对卡尔希下注。

items.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
items.summary: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.
items.title_zh: Cars24 如何利用 OpenAI 扩展对话并加快构建速度
items.summary_zh: Cars24 使用 OpenAI 支持的语音和聊天代理来处理每月超过 100 万分钟的对话时间，恢复 12% 的丢失线索，并为整个公司的团队带来代理工作流程。

items.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
items.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

items.summary_zh: 探索 OpenAI 的自动化红队系统 GPT-Red，该系统使用自我对弈来提高 AI 安全性、对齐和提示注入的稳健性。

items.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
items.summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.
items.title_zh: 代理时代如何管理人工智能投资
items.summary_zh: 了解企业如何通过衡量每美元的有用工作、提高效率和扩展高价值工作流程来管理代理时代的人工智能投资。

items.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
items.summary: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 销售团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work
items.summary_zh: 了解销售团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work 根据实际工作输入创建管道简报、会议准备包、预测审查、客户计划和停滞交易诊断。

items.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
items.summary: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 数据科学团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work
items.summary_zh: 了解数据科学团队如何使用 ChatGPT Work 根据实际工作输入构建根本原因简报、影响读数、KPI 备忘录、范围分析和仪表板规范。

items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
items.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.
items.title_zh: 德国电信如何利用人工智能重新布线电信
items.summary_zh: 德国电信如何通过 OpenAI 成为一家人工智能原生电信公司——改变客户服务、员工工作流程、网络运营和语音的未来。

items.title_zh: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed 在 RTEB 上总体排名第一，推动代理检索

items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 3 部分）：注意力就是您的分析

items.title_zh: 一键从 Hugging Face 到 Amazon SageMaker Studio

items.summary_zh: 您将能够直接在 AI 模式下安全地链接您的首选服务并与之交互。

items.title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
items.summary: Google Images is turning 25. Here’s a look back at some major milestones — and new ways to explore and create visual content.
items.title_zh: 庆祝视觉搜索创新 25 周年
items.summary_zh: Google 图片即将迎来 25 岁生日。以下是一些重要里程碑的回顾，以及探索和创建视觉内容的新方法。

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: 3 Questions: Neural transparency and the future of AI design
items.summary: Assistant Professor Pat Pataranutaporn describes a new interface that lets everyday users glimpse inside an AI's neural network before their chatbot ever says a word.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：神经透明度和人工智能设计的未来
items.summary_zh: 助理教授帕特·帕塔拉努塔蓬 (Pat Pataranutaporn) 描述了一种新界面，可以让日常用户在聊天机器人说一句话之前就了解人工智能的神经网络内部情况。

items.title: Can AI build a jet engine? JARVIS Challenge tests role of AI copilots in tough-tech engineering
items.summary: MIT students designed, built, and tested a jet engine with AI copilots, assessing AI’s usefulness in developing high-performance aerospace systems.

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的学生设计、建造并测试了带有人工智能副驾驶的喷气发动机，评估人工智能在开发高性能航空航天系统中的有用性。

items.title: AI agents create virtual playgrounds to help robots get crucial training data
